name: security
description: Proof-gated vulnerability review and applicability-aware security hardening for JavaScript and TypeScript web and Electron desktop applications.

interface.longDescription: Two complementary workflows for proven JavaScript, TypeScript, and Electron vulnerabilities and applicability-aware OWASP ASVS- and Electron-guided preventive-control assessments.
defaultPrompt: Review this web or Electron application for proven vulnerabilities.
Assess this web or Electron application against the applicable ASVS- and Electron-guided hardening baselines.
